title: Pseudomalcolmia triloba
taxonomy: Pseudomalcolmia triloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is also known as rock cress. The classification of Pseudomalcolmia triloba is within the order Brassicales and class Magnoliopsida. This plant is native to Europe and Asia. Its classification also places it within the kingdom Plantae.
